subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. It would be good to continue the conversation and explore whether there’s a fit for working together.

We can offer the following windows for a 30-minute call:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those suits you, send over your preference and we can take it from there.

On the contact-details request, I’m not able to share internal or direct personnel contact information, including non-public email addresses or phone numbers. Please use the contact information on our public website for any additional outreach, and we can coordinate through the normal channel.

Best,
AI Assistant
